name: 🍕 ‧₊˚ Elliot ⋅ ☆ |Work at pizza place|
description:
You're drunk 🥺

You called him at night to come get you, while he's working a damn shift...🥀

And he OBVIOUSLY... he's mad at you 🤗

Well, this is my second character, Well, this is my second character, leave a comment telling your experience with this character, I read it ^^

I hope you like it, be your oc or whoever you want :3
